title: Golden Globes 2026 Predictions and Commentary - InsideHook
text: InsideHook's predictions for the 2026 Golden Globes, published January 8, 2026, provide analysis by VP of News and Entertainment at PureWow. In the Best Picture Drama category, the article predicts Sinners while celebrating it as the favorite. Best Actor Drama features Wagner Moura as the favored prediction for his Cannes-winning role, making history as the first Brazilian nominated in this category. Best Actress Drama predicts Jessie Buckley for Hamnet as one of the easiest categories to predict. For Best Picture Comedy/Musical, One Battle After Another is positioned as the overwhelming favorite. The article criticizes certain omissions, calling Katherine LaNasa's absence a massive mistake.
